title: Job Openings at Septagus Consulting Nigeria Limited
content:
Septagus Consulting Nigeria Limited is a renowned human resource consulting firm that emerged from an uncommon track record of distilling value to a league of clients.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) HR Assistant

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Recruitment support. Post job ads on job boards and social media platforms.
	Onboarding. Ensure the preboarding process goes smoothly.
	Record-keeping. 
	Benefits administration. 
	Compliance.
	Performance management.
	Employee relations.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor's Degree with at least 3 years of experience.


Application Closing Date: 9th July, 2026.

Method of APplication 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Customer Service Officer

Job Location: Benin City, Edo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Answer Inquiries
	Resolve Customer Complaints
	Process Transactions.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 14th July, 2026.

Method of Applictaion 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Customer Service Officer

Job Locations: Abakaliki - Ebonyi & Edo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Answer Inquiries
	Resolve Customer Complaints
	Process Transactions.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 14th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Secretary",
  "description": "Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Secretary

Job Locations: Ikeja, Yaba, Agege, Ojuelegba, Magodo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Manage the daily / weekly / monthly agenda and arrange new meetings and appointments.
	Prepare and disseminate correspondence, memos and forms.
	File and update contact information of employees, customers, suppliers and external partners.
	Support and facilitate the completion of regular reports.
	Develop and maintain a filing system.
	Check frequently the levels of office supplies and place appropriate orders.
	Make travel arrangements.
	Document expenses and hand in reports.


Salary
N200,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Applications to: gymspadorisfit@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Personal Secretary Job at Dorisfit




        
    

        
        Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Secretary

Job Locations: Ikeja, Yaba, Agege, Ojuelegba, Magodo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

            
    




	Manage the daily / weekly / monthly agenda and arrange new meetings and appointments.
	Prepare and disseminate correspondence, memos and forms.
	File and update contact information of employees, customers, suppliers and external partners.
	Support and facilitate the completion of regular reports.
	Develop and maintain a filing system.
	Check frequently the levels of office supplies and place appropriate orders.
	Make travel arrangements.
	Document expenses and hand in reports.


Salary
N200,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing & Sales Manager",
  "description": "HiiT Plc owns Nigeria&rsquo;s foremost ICT Training/Education Institute, HiiT Training Institute (HiiT for short) with Training Centres across the Nation. We commenced training operations as Hands-on Institute of Information Technology (HiiT) on Monday, 15th April 1996, and we have graduated over 50,000 Students at our Training Centres across the Nation in the past 26 years.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing &amp; Sales Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

Role Summary


	The purpose of our DMSM position is to develop Marketing and Sales Strategies and lead its execution to achieve the company&#39;s Sales goals and objectives.


Key Accountabilites


	Achieve Managements Marketing and Sales goals and objectives in accordance with our Busins Plan.
	Create Social Media Marketing strategies- campaigns (including budget planning, content ideation, and implementation schedules to achieve
	Ensure Brand consistency in our Social Media Nlarketing positioning by working with relevant internal and external teams/ stakeholders.
	Grow and expand company social media presence on social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter, &quot;likTok, WhatsApp and Telegram,
	Ensure the circulation of engaging written or graphic contents in the form Ofe- newsletters, web page and blog content, or social media messages.
	Conduct market research and submit report to Management.


Qualification and Experience


	Education- First Degree in any field (2/2 minimum). MBA with specialization in Marketing is an advantage.
	Experience- Minimum of 3 years of experience in Social Media Marketing, one of which must be as Team Lead or Manager.
	Industry- Service (EdTech, FinTech, Telecoms, Education, Insurance, etc).
	Compatsation: Industry competitive with performance-tier commission.


Core &amp; Skills:


	Personal Qualities- Passionate and Self-Motivated Personality with exemplary business mindset and attention to ICT &amp; Social Media skills&nbsp;
	At least intermediate proficiency in MS Word, Excel &amp; PowerPoint, and excellent Social Media Marketing (Must have active LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram &amp; Facebook accounts).
	Communication skills- Excellent written and verbal skills.
	Performance Evidence- Clear evidence of achievements in Digital Marketing in past in last 3 years.
	Emotional Intelligence- High social and relationship management skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hhcm@hiitplc.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-11",

Digital Marketing & Sales Manager Job at HiiT Plc




        
    

        
        HiiT Plc owns Nigeria’s foremost ICT Training/Education Institute, HiiT Training Institute (HiiT for short) with Training Centres across the Nation. We commenced training operations as Hands-on Institute of Information Technology (HiiT) on Monday, 15th April 1996, and we have graduated over 50,000 Students at our Training Centres across the Nation in the past 26 years.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing & Sales Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

Role Summary
     

            
    




	The purpose of our DMSM position is to develop Marketing and Sales Strategies and lead its execution to achieve the company's Sales goals and objectives.


Key Accountabilites


	Achieve Managements Marketing and Sales goals and objectives in accordance with our Busins Plan.
	Create Social Media Marketing strategies- campaigns (including budget planning, content ideation, and implementation schedules to achieve
	Ensure Brand consistency in our Social Media Nlarketing positioning by working with relevant internal and external teams/ stakeholders.
	Grow and expand company social media presence on social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter, "likTok, WhatsApp and Telegram,
	Ensure the circulation of engaging written or graphic contents in the form Ofe- newsletters, web page and blog content, or social media messages.
	Conduct market research and submit report to Management.


Qualification and Experience


	Education- First Degree in any field (2/2 minimum). MBA with specialization in Marketing is an advantage.
	Experience- Minimum of 3 years of experience in Social Media Marketing, one of which must be as Team Lead or Manager.
	Industry- Service (EdTech, FinTech, Telecoms, Education, Insurance, etc).
	Compatsation: Industry competitive with performance-tier commission.


Core & Skills:


	Personal Qualities- Passionate and Self-Motivated Personality with exemplary business mindset and attention to ICT & Social Media skills 
	At least intermediate proficiency in MS Word, Excel & PowerPoint, and excellent Social Media Marketing (Must have active LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram & Facebook accounts).
	Communication skills- Excellent written and verbal skills.
	Performance Evidence- Clear evidence of achievements in Digital Marketing in past in last 3 years.
	Emotional Intelligence- High social and relationship management skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

            
    




   


    
        Similar Jobs

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Office Assistant",
  "description": "Jules Construction is a construction company with key speciality in home and office improvements / Renovation. With qualified and certified engineers in steel works as well as building construction we are determined to make the experience and process of building to be a memorable one.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Assistant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We need a professional who oversees clerical tasks, such as sorting and sending mail.
	They keep an inventory of office supplies and order new materials as needed to ensure that the workplace is neat and clean for visitors or clients


Responsibilities


	Organize office and assist associates in ways that optimize procedures
	Sort and distribute communications in a timely manner
	Create and update records ensuring accuracy and validity of information
	Schedule and plan meetings and appointments
	Monitor level of supplies and handle shortages
	Resolve office-related malfunctions and respond to requests or issues
	Coordinate with other departments to ensure compliance with established policies.


Qualifications


	Interested candidate should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 1 - 5 years of experience.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: portal.julesconst.net@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-22",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Jules Construction"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Office Assistant Job at Jules Construction




        
    

        
        Jules Construction is a construction company with key speciality in home and office improvements / Renovation. With qualified and certified engineers in steel works as well as building construction we are determined to make the experience and process of building to be a memorable one.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Assistant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

            
    




	We need a professional who oversees clerical tasks, such as sorting and sending mail.
	They keep an inventory of office supplies and order new materials as needed to ensure that the workplace is neat and clean for visitors or clients


Responsibilities


	Organize office and assist associates in ways that optimize procedures
	Sort and distribute communications in a timely manner
	Create and update records ensuring accuracy and validity of information
	Schedule and plan meetings and appointments
	Monitor level of supplies and handle shortages
	Resolve office-related malfunctions and respond to requests or issues
	Coordinate with other departments to ensure compliance with established policies.


Qualifications


	Interested candidate should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 1 - 5 years of experience.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
